name: Spatial Calibration and Measurement
description: You are a microscopist analyzing a sample image. Your goal is to apply spatial calibration and report calibrated measurements. Using the 'Blobs (25K)' sample image, set the scale to 0.50 µm per pixel. Segment the particles and generate a results table including Area, Feret's Diameter, and MinFeret. Save the calibrated measurements to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/calibrated_blob_measurements.csv.
